name: com.onity.framework
description: One Unity package for dependency injection, reactive programming, and events - one idiom, one disposal model, an engine-free core, and allocation-free hot paths. Replaces Zenject/VContainer, R3/UniRx, and MessagePipe with a single coherent API.

samples.description: A runnable mini-game wiring DI + Reactive + Events together through one installer with thin MonoBehaviours.
